task_completion.description: Verify the trajectory starts with the Avare app open on the 'Map' view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first few screenshots should show the Avare app interface displaying a moving map or aviation chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent interacts with the 'PFD' tab or button.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tap, click, or selection action on a UI element labeled 'PFD' in the app's navigation menu or tab bar.

task_completion.description: Verify the Primary Flight Display (PFD) is successfully opened and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen changes to show a glass cockpit-like setup with flight instruments (e.g., attitude indicator, airspeed tape, altimeter).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent interacts with the 'Map' tab or button to return to the main view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tap, click, or selection action on a UI element labeled 'Map' in the app's navigation menu or tab bar after the PFD has been viewed.

task_completion.description: Verify the app successfully returns to the 'Map' view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the Avare app interface back on the default moving map or aviation chart screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the app's graphical user interface to navigate between views.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible taps/clicks on the 'PFD' and 'Map' tabs, rather than terminal windows or ADB commands being used to switch activities.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Avare application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches a standard Android app interface for Avare, not a web browser, image gallery, or text editor displaying mocked images.

integrity.description: Verify the navigation happened in a continuous flow within the same app session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a logical progression from Map -> PFD -> Map without the app crashing, restarting, or switching to unrelated applications.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Avare app package is 'com.ds.avare'. The Primary Flight Display tab is named 'PFD' and displays a glass cockpit-like setup for flight instruments. The default moving map/chart view tab is named 'Map'.
